fullscreen.label: Fullscreen
fullscreen.template:
<>
  <Button
      onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
      text="Open Fullscreen Overlay"
      variant="secondary"
  />
  {open && (
    <Overlay{{props}}>
      {{children}}
    </Overlay>
  )}
</>

presets.name: Black Gradient
presets.children:
<Background
    alt="Colorful abstract background"
    backgroundPosition="center"
    imageUrl="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1528459801416-a9e53bbf4e17?ixlib=rb-1.2.1&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
    minHeight="320px"
    width="100%"
>
  <Flex minHeight="320px" orientation="column" padding="lg" vertical="center">
    <Title dark size={3} text="Gradient Overlay" />
    <Body color="light" text="Full-width Background kit image with Overlay gradient." />
  </Flex>
</Background>

presets.name: No Gradient
presets.children:
<Background
    alt="Colorful abstract background"
    backgroundPosition="center"
    imageUrl="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1528459801416-a9e53bbf4e17?ixlib=rb-1.2.1&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
    minHeight="320px"
    width="100%"
>
  <Flex minHeight="320px" orientation="column" padding="lg" vertical="center">
    <Title dark size={3} text="Flat Overlay" />
    <Body color="light" text="gradient={false} removes the fade treatment." />
  </Flex>
</Background>

presets.name: Horizontal
presets.children:
<Flex columnGap="lg" orientation="row" overflowX="auto">
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 1'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 2'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 3'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 4'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 5'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 6'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 7'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 8'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 9'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 10'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 11'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 12'}</Card></FlexItem>
</Flex>

presets.name: Full Screen
presets.children:
<FixedConfirmationToast
    closeable
    horizontal="center"
    onClose={handleClose}
    open={open}
    status="tip"
    text="Fullscreen overlay content"
    vertical="top"
/>

presets.name: Hide Scrollbar
presets.children:
<Flex columnGap="lg" orientation="row" overflowX="auto">
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 1'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 2'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 3'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 4'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 5'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 6'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 7'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 8'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 9'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 10'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 11'}</Card></FlexItem>
  <FlexItem fixedSize="160px"><Card>{'Card 12'}</Card></FlexItem>
</Flex>

layout.message: layout controls overlay direction and size. Use keys like bottom, top, x, or y with token values like full, xl, or percentages.

gradient.message: gradient={false} removes the default gradient treatment and uses a flatter color overlay.

fullscreen.message: fullScreen changes the overlay to a fixed viewport layer; pair it with content that can close or explain the state.

scrollbar.message: scrollBarNone hides the scrollbar while preserving scrollable overflow content.
